text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is a genuine, well-known foundational work in quantum chemistry by Erich Hückel, published in Zeitschrift für Physik in 1931. The minor spelling difference in the title ("Quanstentheoretische" vs "Quantentheoretische") is a common transcription error.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1007/BF01341953
FOUND_TITLE: Quantentheoretische Beiträge zum Benzolproblem. II. Quantentheorie der induzierten Polaritäten
FOUND_AUTHORS: E. Hückel
FOUND_YEAR: 1931
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
